name: UCC28730
notes: Primary-side regulation flyback controller for ultra-low standby. Works with UCC24650 secondary-side wake-up. SOT23-6 package.

name: UCC28740
notes: SSR flyback controller using opto-coupler for CV, PSR for CC. SOIC-7 package. 5W-50W applications.

name: UCC28742
notes: High-efficiency flyback controller for 5W-50W industrial and medical AC/DC. SOT23-6 package.

name: UCC3817
notes: CCM PFC controller with average current mode control. 16-pin PDIP/SOIC. Legacy part, widely used.

name: NCP1380
notes: QR current-mode flyback controller for high-power adapters. Valley lockout prevents valley jumping. SOIC-8 package.

name: NCP1340
notes: Highly integrated QR flyback controller with X2 cap discharge enabling <30mW no-load. 7-pin or 9-pin SOIC.

name: NCP1366
notes: Low-power offline CC PWM controller for up to 20W. Valley lockout at first 4 valleys. SOIC-8/DIP-8.

name: TEA1716
notes: Combo PFC + LLC resonant half-bridge controller. 90W-500W applications. Multi-chip IC with integrated burst mode.

name: ICE3PCS01G
notes: CCM PFC controller in PG-DSO-14. Can synchronize with external clock 50-100kHz. VCC 11-25V. For 300W-2.5kW PFC stages.

name: L6562
notes: Transition-mode PFC controller in DIP-8/SO-8. Widely used for <400W PFC pre-regulators. L6562A is improved version.

name: L6599
notes: High-voltage resonant half-bridge controller. VCC supply 12-20V, drives half-bridge via bootstrap. SO-16 package.

name: L6699
notes: Enhanced resonant half-bridge controller supporting LLC and LCC. Auto-adaptive deadtime. SO-16 package.

name: NCP1200
notes: Low-cost fixed-frequency (40/60/100kHz variants) PWM flyback controller. SO-8/DIP-8. For wall adapters and standby SMPS.

name: NCP1207
notes: QR free-running flyback controller for consumer products. DIP-8/SO-8 package. For notebooks, DVD, set-top boxes.

name: TNY290PG
notes: TinySwitch-4 family. Integrated 725V MOSFET, up to 28.5W. DIP-7 package. ON/OFF control (not PWM).

name: LNK3206D
notes: LinkSwitch-TN2 family. Integrated 725V/900V MOSFET. Supports buck, buck-boost, flyback. SO-8C package.

name: UCC28780
notes: High-frequency ACF controller for USB PD chargers. Works with UCC24612 SR. QFN-20 package. Up to 65W+ designs.

name: UCC28782
notes: High-density ACF controller with EMI dithering and X-cap discharge. For USB-C PD applications. >93% efficiency achievable.

name: NCP1568
notes: ACF controller with proprietary variable-frequency ZVS algorithm. Integrated HV startup, strong low-side driver, 5V logic for GaN clamp FET.

name: MP6908
notes: Intelligent SR controller (diode emulator) for flyback. Regulates FET forward drop to ~40mV. No aux winding needed. SOIC-8.

name: UCC256404
notes: LLC resonant controller with X-cap discharge. Pairs with UCC28056 PFC + UCC24624 SR for complete system. SOIC-16 package.

name: UCC256402
notes: LLC resonant controller without X-cap discharge (vs UCC256404). Pairs with UCC28056/UCC28064A PFC. SOIC-16 package.

name: UCC25630
notes: LLC resonant controller family (UCC256301/02/03/04 variants). SOIC-14 package. NRND - replaced by UCC25640x.

name: NCP1399
notes: High-performance current-mode LLC controller with integrated 600V drivers. Dedicated PFC enable output. SOIC-16/20 package.

name: IRS27951
notes: 600V half-bridge resonant controller. Bootstrap high-side drive. SOIC-8 package. Simple, low pin count.

name: ICE2HS01G
notes: High-performance LLC resonant controller. 20-pin. Up to 1MHz switching frequency. 3-level overcurrent protection.

name: UCC28056
notes: 6-pin TM/DCM PFC controller for up to 300W. Multi-mode TM and DCM control. Pairs with UCC256403/4 LLC. SOT23-6.

name: UCC28070
notes: Two-phase interleaved CCM PFC controller. 180deg out-of-phase reduces input/output ripple and EMI. SOIC-20 package.

name: NCP1654
notes: CCM PFC controller in SO-8. Fixed frequency 65/133/200kHz variants. Simple implementation with minimal external components.

name: NCP1622
notes: 6-pin CrM PFC controller with VSFF method for high efficiency at nominal and light load. TSOP6 package.

name: NCL30000
notes: Single-stage PFC LED driver controller. CrM operation for near-unity PF. SO-8 package.

name: FAN9611
notes: Interleaved dual BCM PFC controller. 180deg out-of-phase extends practical power to >800W. Zero-current switching of boost diodes. SOIC-20.

name: NCP81239
notes: USB PD 4-switch buck-boost controller. Drives 4 NMOSFETs for bidirectional voltage conversion. QFN package.

name: LM5148-Q1
notes: Automotive 80V sync buck controller with ultra-low IQ. Adjustable output 0.8-55V. VQFN-24 package. AEC-Q100 qualified.

name: LM5146
notes: 100V sync buck controller. Voltage-mode control for wide duty cycle range. 48V-to-low-voltage rail direct conversion. VQFN-20.

name: LM5166
notes: Compact 65V/500mA sync buck with integrated FETs. Ultra-low IQ. P-channel high-side for 100% duty cycle. VSON-10.

name: TPS54360
notes: 60V/3.5A step-down regulator with integrated high-side FET. Current-mode control. HSOIC-8 PowerPAD. ISO 7637 compliant.

name: TPS56837HA
notes: 28V/8A sync buck with D-CAP3 control. Supports 5/9/15/20V USB PD dynamic output. HotRod QFN 3x3mm. No external compensation needed.

name: LTC7891
notes: 100V GaN-optimized sync buck controller. Split gate drivers for independent turn-on/off control. QFN-28. Low IQ.

name: LTC3892
notes: Dual 60V sync buck controller. OPTI-DRIVE adjustable gate voltage. Up to 97% efficiency, >60A output. QFN-32 or TSSOP.

name: MAX15157B
notes: 60V current-mode buck controller with accurate current sense amplifier and IMON output. Dynamic output via REFIN. QFN package.

name: ISL8117
notes: 60V sync buck controller with valley current modulation. Best-in-class 40ns min on-time. QFN-16 or HTSSOP-16. 10 external components.

name: LTC3122
notes: Sync boost with integrated 2.5A switches. Output disconnect in shutdown. Output 2.2-15V. DFN-12 or MSOP-12.

name: LT8330
notes: Compact boost/SEPIC/inverting converter with integrated 60V/1A switch. Fixed 2MHz. ThinSOT or DFN-8 package.

name: TPS61088
notes: High-power sync boost with 10A switch. 30W from single Li-ion cell. VQFN 4.5x3.5mm. For portable systems.

name: TPS61089
notes: Compact sync boost with 7A switch. Ultra-small 2.0x2.5mm VQFN-11 package. PFM/PWM mode variants.

name: LM5175
notes: 42V 4-switch buck-boost controller. Output 0.8-55V. Valley/peak current mode. External FETs. TSSOP-28 package.

name: LT8390
notes: 60V sync 4-switch buck-boost controller. Single inductor. Input/output current monitoring. TSSOP-28 or QFN-28. For battery chargers, solar, automotive.

name: TPS55340
notes: Integrated 5A/40V boost/SEPIC/flyback regulator. Wide input range. QFN-16 or HTSSOP-14. For multi-cell battery and regulated rail applications.

name: MPQ8632
notes: High-efficiency 18V sync buck family with integrated FETs. 4/6/8/10/12/15/20A variants. QFN packages.

name: UCC24612
notes: High-frequency SR controller for ACF, QR/DCM/CCM flyback, and LLC. VDS sensing. SOT23-5 package.

name: UCC24612-2
notes: UCC24612-2 variant with higher noise immunity min on-time vs -1 variant. SOT23-5 package.

name: NCP4306
notes: SR driver for flyback and LLC. Kelvin MOSFET connection for high efficiency. Standalone or companion IC. SOIC-8/DFN package.

name: NCP4305
notes: SR driver with light-load detection for smooth transitions. VDS monitoring based turn-on/off. SOIC-8 package.

name: MP6922
notes: Dual-channel SR controller for LLC converters. Regulates FET forward drop to ~70mV. SOIC-8E/SOIC-14 package.

name: TEA1795
notes: GreenChip dual SR controller for resonant converters. Two independent driver stages. SOI process. SO-16 package.

name: UCC21710
notes: Single-channel isolated gate driver for 1700V SiC/IGBT. VDD output 13-33V. Capacitive SiO2 isolation. SOIC-16W package.

name: UCC21520
notes: Isolated dual-channel gate driver. Configurable as 2 low-side, 2 high-side, or half-bridge. Up to 5MHz. SOIC-16W package.

name: Si8271
notes: Single-channel 4A ISOdriver. Industry-leading CMTI. Drive supply up to 30V. SOIC-8 package.

name: ADUM4135
notes: Isolated IGBT gate driver with desaturation detection and Miller clamp. iCoupler technology. SOIC-16W package.

name: 2EDL05N06PF
notes: 600V half-bridge gate driver with integrated bootstrap diode. SOI technology. DSO-8 package. Low-cost option for LLC converters.

name: ISO5451
notes: Isolated IGBT/MOSFET gate driver with desat and Miller clamp. 15-30V output supply. SOIC-16 package.

name: NCP51530
notes: 700V high-speed half-bridge driver. NCP51530A (60ns) and NCP51530B (25ns) variants. For high-density SMPS, LLC, ACF.

name: IR2110
notes: Classic 500V half-bridge driver. 14-DIP package. Legacy part but still widely used. Bootstrap high-side drive.

name: IR2184
notes: 600V half-bridge driver with shutdown. Small 8-pin PDIP/SOIC package. Bootstrap high-side drive.

name: UCC27714
notes: Industry fastest 600V half-bridge driver. 4A output. Best-in-class propagation delay and matching. SOIC-14 package.

name: FAN7392
notes: High-current 600V half-bridge driver. Common-mode noise canceling. For SMPS and DC-DC converters. DIP-8/SOIC-8 package.

name: HIP2101
notes: 100V/2A high-frequency half-bridge driver. TTL compatible inputs. 13ns channel matching. SOIC/QFN/DFN packages.

name: INN3072M
notes: InnoSwitch3-TN. Integrated 725V FET + SR + controller. FluxLink isolated feedback. MinSOP-16A. Up to 12W at 230VAC.

name: INN3672C
notes: InnoSwitch3-EP. Integrated 725V FET + SR + controller for industrial/HVAC. FluxLink feedback. Up to 12W at 230VAC.

name: UCG28826
notes: QR flyback with integrated 750V GaN. Self-bias eliminates auxiliary winding. Auxless sensing. For 65W USB PD chargers.

name: LMG3410R070
notes: 600V/70mOhm GaN FET with integrated driver and protection. 100V/ns switching. VQFN-32 package. LMG3411R070 has cycle-by-cycle OCP variant.

name: LMG3425R030
notes: 600V/30mOhm GaN FET with integrated driver. 150V/ns. Temperature monitor via PWM output. LMG3422R030 is latch-off OCP variant.

name: TMS320F280025C
notes: C2000 real-time MCU. 100MHz, FPU, TMU, CLB. For digital power, motor control, solar. QFP-64 package.

name: TMS320F28027F
notes: C2000 Piccolo MCU. 60MHz, InstaSPIN-FOC capable. For motor control and digital power. QFP-38 package.

name: TMS320F28035
notes: C2000 Piccolo MCU with CLA math accelerator. 60MHz. For digital power and motor control. QFP-80 package.

name: TMS320F280039
notes: C2000 real-time MCU. 120MHz, FPU, TMU, CLA. Designed for high-frequency GaN/SiC power conversion. QFP-80 package.

name: XDPP1100
notes: XDP digital power controller. Programmable ARM Cortex-M0. PMBus 1.3. For telecom, server, and industrial DC-DC. VQFN-24/40.

name: XDPL8210
notes: Digital single-stage QR flyback LED driver controller. Primary-side regulated CC output. Flicker-free dimming. SOIC-16.

name: BQ25570
notes: Energy harvesting PMIC. Boost charger from 100mV+. Integrated buck converter. MPPT. QFN-20 3.5x3.5mm. For solar/thermal/piezo harvesters.

name: MP2696A
notes: Single-cell switching charger with power-path management and boost output. I2C programmable. QFN-21 3x3mm.

name: TPS25750
notes: Standalone USB-C PD controller with integrated power switches. QFN-38/32 packages. No firmware needed for basic operation.

name: TPS25740B
notes: USB PD 2.0 source controller. No MCU/firmware required. Automatic PD negotiation. Up to 20V/100W. QFN-24 package.

name: TL431
notes: Essential for voltage divider feedback networks in all converter types

name: NCP7805
notes: Low-dropout 5V regulator for gate driver and controller bias supplies

name: TPS25740
notes: Overvoltage protection controller with integrated FET for USB PD and telecom

name: DRV8353
notes: Integrated 3-phase gate driver for BLDC motors and 3-phase inverters

name: TPS7A16
notes: 60V 100mA ultralow-IQ LDO with enable and power-good. Fixed versions: TPS7A1633 (3.3V), TPS7A1650 (5V). Adjustable version: TPS7A1601 (1.2V-18.5V). Packages: HVSSOP-8 (DGN) and VSON-8 (DRB) with exposed thermal pad.

name: LM3880MFX-1AF/NOPB
notes: Imported via Mouser API. MPN: LM3880MFX-1AF/NOPB

name: LM3880QMFE-1AC/NOPB
notes: Imported via Mouser API. MPN: LM3880QMFE-1AC/NOPB

name: LM3880MFX-1AC/NOPB
notes: Imported via Mouser API. MPN: LM3880MFX-1AC/NOPB

name: LM3880QMF-1AC/NOPB
notes: Imported via Mouser API. MPN: LM3880QMF-1AC/NOPB

name: LM3880MF-1AB/NOPB
notes: Imported via Mouser API. MPN: LM3880MF-1AB/NOPB

name: NCP1361
notes: Low-power offline QR flyback controller with primary-side constant-current regulation. No secondary-side current sensing needed. Valley-lockout prevents valley-jumping instability. NCP1361 has no HV startup (external VCC supply); NCP1366 has 560V HV startup current source. Available in TSOP-6 (NCP1361) and SOIC-7 (NCP1366). Frequency clamp options: none, 80kHz, or 110kHz. Minimum VCO frequency options: 200Hz, 600Hz, 1.2kHz, 23kHz. <30mW no-load with NCP1366. For chargers/adapters up to ~20W.

name: LM72880-Q1
reason: Automotive 80V synchronous buck converter with I2C interface
notes: 80V, 8A automotive synchronous buck with I2C. Peak current-mode control. 6x6 QFN-29. Designed to pair with TPS2674X-Q1 USB PD controllers.

name: TPS26744E-Q1
reason: Automotive dual-port USB Type-C PD3.2 controller with 240W EPR
notes: Dual-port USB Type-C PD3.2 source controller with EPR support up to 240W. Controls external DC/DC via I2C or PWM. 5x5 QFN-32. USB-IF certified TID #14058.

name: INN3678C
notes: InnoSwitch3-EP family off-line CV/CC flyback switcher with integrated 750V MOSFET, synchronous rectification, and FluxLink isolated feedback. Delivers up to 65W. InSOP-24D package.

part.matchcodeDescription: connector: solder terminal test point turret
connector: 6 Way, 1 Row, Straight Pin header
connector: 4 Way, 1 Row, Straight Pin header
connector: Female Straight Black 2 Way 1 Row
